mapper.select: SELECT password FROM teacher WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
SELECT id FROM teacher WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, username, full_name, phone FROM teacher WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO teacher (username, password, full_name, phone) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, '', '')
mapper.update: UPDATE teacher SET password = #{password} WHERE username = #{username}
